policies.title: Return Policy — General
policies.text: Items must be returned within 30 days of purchase in their original, unused condition. Packaging should be unopened and undamaged. You must include proof of purchase (such as a receipt or tax invoice) with your return. All paperwork, parts, and accessories received with the product must also be returned. If the item was part of a set, bundle, or received with a gift, all related items must be returned together in original condition.

policies.title: Return Policy — Clothing
policies.text: Clothing returns must be in their original, unused condition with all tags attached. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and free of any alterations. Packaging should be unopened and undamaged. You must include proof of purchase (such as a receipt or tax invoice) with your return. All paperwork, parts, and accessories received with the product must also be returned. If the item was part of a set, bundle, or received with a gift, all related items must be returned together in original condition.

policies.title: Return Policy — Non-Returnable Items
policies.text: Certain items cannot be returned or exchanged, including: bags, belts, jewellery, accessories, swimwear, underwear, fragrance, and beauty products. Sale items marked as final sale are also non-returnable. Gift cards and vouchers cannot be returned for cash.

policies.title: Refund Policy
policies.text: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and inspected. Refunds are issued to the original payment method. Cash payments are refunded via bank transfer. Credit card refunds may take an additional 5-10 business days to appear on your statement. Store credit is issued immediately upon approval.

policies.title: Exchange Policy
policies.text: Exchanges are available within 14 days of purchase for the same item in a different size or color, subject to availability. The item must be in its original, unused condition with all tags and packaging. Price differences for exchanges to a different item will be charged or refunded accordingly.

policies.title: Warranty Policy
policies.text: All electronics and appliances come with a manufacturer's warranty of at least 12 months. Watches carry a 2-year international warranty. Warranty claims must be accompanied by the original purchase receipt and warranty card. Warranty does not cover damage caused by misuse, accidents, or unauthorized repairs.

policies.title: Shipping Policy
policies.text: Standard delivery within Dubai: 2-3 business days. Same-day delivery available for orders placed before 12 PM within Dubai city limits (AED 25 surcharge). Free shipping on orders above AED 200. Express delivery (next day) available for AED 35. International shipping to GCC countries: 5-7 business days.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
policies.text: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement for a full refund. After 1 hour, cancellation is subject to a 10% restocking fee if the order has not yet shipped. Orders that have already been shipped cannot be cancelled — please use the return process instead.
